name: mios_build_status
description: Structured output for an MiOS build pipeline result. Used as Responses API text.format or Chat Completions response_format.

image.description: Full OCI image ref of the produced image.

digest.description: sha256 digest of the produced image manifest.

phases_completed.description: Names of automation/[0-9][0-9]-*.sh phase scripts that completed successfully.

phases_failed.description: Phase scripts that failed (captured in FAIL_LOG; build.sh continues with set +e).

sbom_path.description: Path to CycloneDX SBOM if produced (e.g. artifacts/sbom/mios-sbom.json), else null.
